popular_professors.ranking_basis: Curated from official Stanford Profiles pages, prioritizing current university-wide academic leaders, department chairs, institute directors, and highly visible endowed-chair faculty with clear active appointments.
popular_professors.source_summary: Extracted from official Stanford Profiles pages on stanford.edu/profiles.

items.name: Jennifer Widom
items.bio: Frederick Emmons Terman Dean of the School of Engineering and Fletcher Jones Professor; her official Stanford profile notes prior service as Computer Science chair and senior associate dean.

items.name: Carolyn Bertozzi
items.department: Chemistry / Sarafan ChEM-H / Chemical and Systems Biology
items.bio: Baker Family Director of Sarafan ChEM-H and Anne T. and Robert M. Bass Professor; her official Stanford profile also notes her Howard Hughes Medical Institute investigator role.

items.name: Fei-Fei Li
items.bio: Sequoia Capital Professor and Denning co-director of Stanford HAI (on leave); her official profile lists research interests in AI, machine learning, computer vision, robotics, and AI plus healthcare.

items.name: Russ B. Altman
items.department: Bioengineering / Genetics / Medicine / Biomedical Data Science
items.bio: Kenneth Fong Professor with appointments across bioengineering, genetics, medicine, and biomedical data science, plus Stanford HAI senior fellowship per his official Stanford profile.

items.name: Mehran Sahami
items.bio: Tencent Chair of the Computer Science Department and James and Ellenor Chesebrough Professor; his official profile notes work in computer science education, AI, and prior Google research experience.

items.name: Monica Lam
items.bio: Kleiner Perkins, Mayfield, Sequoia Capital Professor whose official Stanford profile highlights research on reliable AI assistants and open-source LLM-based tools for knowledge discovery.

items.name: Maneesh Agrawala
items.bio: Forest Baskett Professor whose official Stanford profile lists research interests in computer graphics, human-computer interaction, and visualization.

items.name: Condoleezza Rice
items.department: Political Science / Hoover Institution / Graduate School of Business
items.bio: Tad and Dianne Taube Director of the Hoover Institution and Denning Professor of Global Business and the Economy, with a courtesy Stanford political science appointment on her official profile.

items.name: Rob Reich
items.department: Social Ethics of Science and Technology / Political Science
items.bio: McGregor-Girand Professor of Social Ethics of Science and Technology and Stanford HAI senior fellow; his official Stanford profile also lists courtesy appointments in education, philosophy, and law.

items.name: Scott D. Sagan
items.bio: Caroline S. G. Munro Memorial Professor of Political Science and FSI senior fellow; his official Stanford profile emphasizes research on nuclear security, norms of force, and hazardous technologies.

items.name: Mark Horowitz
items.bio: Fortinet Founders Chair of the Department of Electrical Engineering, Yahoo! Founders Professor in the School of Engineering, and Professor of Computer Science on his official Stanford profile.

items.name: Dan Boneh
items.bio: Cryptography Professor and Professor of Electrical Engineering whose official Stanford profile says he heads the applied cryptography group and co-directs the computer security lab.

items.name: Jure Leskovec
items.bio: Professor of Computer Science according to his official Stanford profile.

items.name: Christopher Re
items.bio: Professor of Computer Science; his official Stanford profile identifies him as Christopher (Chris) Re in the Computer Science department.

items.name: Percy Liang
items.bio: Professor of Computer Science and Senior Fellow at the Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI on his official Stanford profile.

items.name: Erik Brynjolfsson
items.department: Human-Centered AI / Economics / Operations, Information & Technology
items.bio: Jerry Yang and Akiko Yamazaki Professor and Stanford Digital Economy Lab director; his official Stanford profile also lists appointments at HAI, SIEPR, Economics, and Operations, Information & Technology.

items.name: Subhasish Mitra
items.bio: William E. Ayer Professor of Electrical Engineering and Professor of Computer Science on his official Stanford profile.

items.name: Dorsa Sadigh
items.bio: Associate Professor of Computer Science, of Electrical Engineering, and Senior Fellow at the Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI on her official Stanford profile.

items.name: Emma Brunskill
items.bio: Associate Professor of Computer Science according to her official Stanford profile.

items.name: Stefano Ermon
items.bio: Associate Professor of Computer Science and Senior Fellow at the Woods Institute for the Environment on his official Stanford profile.

successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Curated from official Stanford Engineering alumni spotlight pages, prioritizing entries with explicit degree year and program labels and clear post-graduation trajectory described on the official page.
successful_alumni.source_summary: Extracted from official Stanford Engineering alumni spotlight pages and the Welcome Engineering Alumni page.

items.name: Anthony Kinslow
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight says he works on energy efficiency as part of combating global warming and emphasizes the social and racial dimensions of efficiency access.
items.description: Engineer focused on energy efficiency and climate equity.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Chip Huyen
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight notes she published two books before Stanford and describes her growth in public speaking as a computer science student.
items.description: Computer science alum and writer featured by Stanford Engineering.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Adrienne Johnson
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight says she planned to move to Cape Town to work as a civil engineer building a sustainable technology center in a historically disadvantaged community.
items.description: Civil engineer headed to build a sustainable technology center in Cape Town.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Tess Hatch
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight describes how work at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory and the Curiosity rover mission deepened her commitment to space exploration.
items.description: Aerospace engineer inspired by NASA and Mars rover mission control.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Andrew Davis
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight explains how he combined music and computer science through digital audio workstations and coding music.
items.description: Computer science alum combining coding with digital music production.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Jorge Cueto
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight frames his story around low-income background, Stanford financial aid access, and persistence into computer science at Stanford.
items.description: Computer science alum featured for access, persistence, and financial-aid advocacy.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Justin Kruger
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight describes his lifelong fascination with space, aerospace internships in Australia, and desire to build spacecraft.
items.description: Aerospace engineer focused on spacecraft and space exploration.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Jamie Young
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight says she was excited to live abroad and work on a renewable-energy project using the technical skills she honed at Stanford.
items.description: Mechanical engineering alum headed to a renewable-energy project abroad.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Stephanie Schmidt
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight says her early dream of becoming an astronaut evolved into bioengineering work at Stanford.
items.description: Bioengineering alum inspired by space and biomedical engineering.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Ved Chirayath
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight says his interests shifted from extraterrestrial life to exploring overlooked biodiversity in Earth’s oceans.
items.description: Aeronautics and astronautics alum focused on ocean and planetary exploration.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Helena Scutt
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight recalls how an early Stanford physics exam sharpened her determination to persist in engineering.
items.description: Mechanical engineering alum featured for persistence in STEM.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Maria Holland
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight says her research examined how the brain grows and changes, including patterns that resembled the quilt imagery she discussed.
items.description: Mechanical engineering alum researching brain growth and change.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Ben Taylor
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight highlights his enthusiasm for Stanford’s Product Realization Lab and hands-on design work.
items.description: Mechanical engineering alum shaped by hands-on product design work.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Cynthia Yin
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight emphasizes her work building inclusive engineering community spaces open across years, majors, and genders.
items.description: Computer science alum featured for inclusive engineering community leadership.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Gawan Fiore
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight says he refined a power-balancing model for Stanford’s solar car using environmental and real-time vehicle data.
items.description: Computer science alum applying modeling skills to solar-car systems.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Sasha Denisin
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight says she used robots to run experiments that enable large-scale scientific studies.
items.description: Bioengineering alum focused on robotic tools for large-scale experiments.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Andrea Ramirez
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight says ENGR193 helped her become more confident describing her identity, skills, and what she could contribute to a team.
items.description: Electrical engineering alum highlighted for communication and professional confidence.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Marie Johnson
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight says the Stanford Student Space Initiative’s Rockets team opened her eyes to aerospace applications for materials science.
items.description: Materials science and engineering alum drawn toward aerospace applications.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official person-specific alumni, spotlight, or news profile with explicit school/program context and substantive narrative detail.

items.name: Sherrie Wang
items.bio: Official Stanford Engineering spotlight connects her Stanford path to a family legacy of academic and engineering achievement, including her grandmother’s trailblazing work in thermodynamics.
items.description: Computational and mathematical engineering alum featured through a multigenerational STEM story.

items.description: Mechanical engineering alum inspired by space science and big unanswered questions.
